title: It's My Love Story
overview: Vandana is a fashion designing student in Vizag, who convinces her parents to let her move to Hyderabad. Arjun, is a Hyderabad-based game developer. The two become friends and after one bad experience with her roommate, Vandana moves in with Arjun. When Vandana’s mother learns of this, she rushes to Hyderabad and brings her back to Vizag. That’s when the estranged friends realize their true feelings for each other.
